raw_consumer_statement: XXXX charged me for an " upgrade '' when i never received or agreed to an " upgrade '' when presented with the invoice the dates of my arrival and departure are wrong when i clearly left the state and have proof that i was no longer there for the night of XX/XX/XXXX as my flight back home to XXXX was on the XXXX. They basically stole {$3800.00} from me. I have opened XXXX disputes with American express given them all the supporting documentation only for them to deny it everytime.
